S.FORM: = Omar al-Bashir = Mntucing hngkawas 1944 idas 1 jiyax 1 ka Omar al-Bashir ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Sudan ta sayang o kiya ka Omar al-Bashir, pnaah hngkawas 1993 idas 10 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = omaɾ al-basħiɾ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka omaɾ al-basħiɾ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sudan ta sajaŋ o kija ka omaɾ al-basħiɾ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Omar al-Bashir = Mntucing hngkawas 1944 idas 1 jiyax 1 ka Omar al-Bashir ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Sudan ta sayang o kiya ka Omar al-Bashir, pnaah hngkawas 1993 idas 10 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = omaɾ al-basħiɾ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka omaɾ al-basħiɾ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sudan ta sajaŋ o kija ka omaɾ al-basħiɾ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
